expectations.text: Includes safe preflight commands: slack version, slack auth list, and slack doctor
expectations.evidence: Missing one or more of slack version, slack auth list, slack doctor.

expectations.text: Mentions inspecting .slack project metadata before changing configuration
Explains using explicit --team and/or --app to resolve workspace/app selection
expectations.evidence: Does not include both --team and --app selectors.

expectations.text: Avoids destructive commands and avoids exposing secrets
expectations.evidence: Warns against changes/destructive actions and shows no raw tokens.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions check the core Slack CLI safety and command guidance for this prompt.
